impact: This makes malformed Python in ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements fail immediately, while skipping cleanly if the narrow module has not been added yet and avoiding broad online trade permit validation side effects.
summary: Add a one-file syntax-first import sentinel for online trade permit requirements.
target_task: Task checkbox-126: Repair the online trade permit syntax-first import test as one test file only: import only `ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements`, skip if the module is absent, and fail malformed Python before broad online trade permit requirement validation runs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
